scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgRed,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgWhite,bgGray" --names "GATEWAY,AUTH,PARKS,RESERV,EVENTS,INCIDENTS,MAINT,INVENT" "npm run dev --prefix gateway" "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix parks-service" "npm run dev --prefix reservation-service" "npm run dev --prefix events-service" "npm run dev --prefix incidents-service" "npm run dev --prefix maintenance-service" "npm run dev --prefix inventory-service"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix parks-service && npm install --prefix reservation-service && npm install --prefix events-service && npm install --prefix incidents-service && npm install --prefix maintenance-service && npm install --prefix inventory-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.kill: powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'Procesos Node terminados'"
